message:
feat(connectors): retry Figma 5xx errors and add Bitwarden doctor provisioning checks

Figma: classify server errors (5xx) as Retryable instead of Terminal in
both request_json and request_json_with_body retry loops, allowing
transient backend failures to be retried.

Bitwarden: add three new doctor checks — base_url_policy (HTTPS required,
localhost exempt), auth_validation (lightweight list_collections probe),
and organization_validation (optional, verifies org access). Each check
includes structured pass/fail messages and critical flags.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
